context: Tests whether the agent writes Vaadin Browserless server-side unit tests for a Product Catalog view (UC-010) following the browserless-test skill: correct class name pattern, @UseCase annotations mirroring spec headings, SpringBrowserlessTest base class, @SpringBootTest annotation, $() and test() usage patterns, AssertJ assertions, no Mockito, no @Transactional, and Flyway-based test data.

checklist.name: UseCase annotation created
checklist.description: A UseCase.java annotation interface is created with exactly the attributes: String id(), String scenario() default "Main Success Scenario", String[] businessRules() default {}

checklist.name: UseCase annotation shape
checklist.description: The UseCase annotation has @Target(ElementType.METHOD), @Retention(RetentionPolicy.RUNTIME), and @Documented meta-annotations

checklist.name: Test class name pattern
checklist.description: The test class is named UC010BrowseProductCatalogTest (matching the UC<id><PascalCaseUseCaseName>Test pattern for UC-010)

checklist.name: @SpringBootTest annotation
checklist.description: The test class is annotated with @SpringBootTest

checklist.name: @UseCase on every test method
checklist.description: Every @Test method in the test class has a @UseCase annotation with at least the id attribute set to "UC-010"

checklist.name: @UseCase scenario matches spec
checklist.description: At least one test method uses scenario = "A1: Filter by Category" or scenario = "A2: No Products Match Filter" — matching the alternative flow headings in the UC-010 spec

checklist.name: @UseCase businessRules matches spec
checklist.description: At least one test method includes businessRules = {"BR-010"} matching the BR-010 heading in the spec

checklist.name: $() used to find components
checklist.description: The test class uses the $() query method to locate Vaadin components (e.g. $(Grid.class), $(ComboBox.class))

checklist.name: test() used for actions only
checklist.description: test(component) is used for actions (click, setValue, selectItem) and NOT to read component state — state is read via component Java API (e.g. .getValue(), .isEnabled(), .size())

checklist.name: AssertJ assertions
checklist.description: Assertions use AssertJ (assertThat(...)) rather than JUnit assertTrue/assertEquals or Hamcrest matchers

checklist.name: No Mockito
checklist.description: No Mockito imports or usage (import org.mockito, @Mock, @MockBean, Mockito.when, mock()) appear anywhere in the test class

checklist.name: No @Transactional
checklist.description: The test class and its methods do NOT use the @Transactional annotation

checklist.name: Flyway test migration file
checklist.description: A SQL migration file exists under src/test/resources/db/migration/ with the Flyway naming pattern V<NNN>__*.sql that inserts product test data
